message:
sync: integrate concurrent agent changes (scope API, region guards, buf_reader)

- scope.rs: Changed spawn() to take closure producing future with child Cx
- region.rs: Added return bool to add_child/add_task for rejection handling
- buf_reader.rs: New buffered async reader implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
